## Perio Voice Sprint — Submission

**GitHub repo URL:**

> If private, confirm judges have been added as collaborators (ask in Discord `#perio-voice` for their GitHub usernames)

**Loom demo URL:**

> Max 5 minutes · Must show live mode running against at least one benchmark audio clip · No staged output

**STT engine used:**

**200-word write-up:**

> Cover: STT engine, sequencing approach, how you handle implicit tooth increment, latency optimizations, known limitations. Honest > polished.

---

**Checklist:**
- [ ] GitHub repo is accessible to judges (public or collaborators added)
- [ ] Loom demo shows live mode against benchmark audio
- [ ] Write-up is included above or linked
- [ ] Solution is cloud-hosted — no local GPU required
- [ ] I have read `TERMS.md` and agree to the Terms & Conditions, including the IP relinquishment requirement for prize winners
